mutation PatientRegistrationBillingUpdat:
mutation PatientRegistrationBillingUpdate(
    $registrationId: ObjectId!
    $verificationStatus: RegistrationBillingVerificationStatus!
    $billingStatus: RegistrationBillingStatus!
    $coPay: Cents!
    $coInsurance: Cents!
    $deductable: Cents!
    $outOfPocket: Cents!
    $paymentStatus: RegistrationBillingPaymentStatus!
    $insuranceType: RegistrationBillingInsuranceType
  ) {
    patientRegistrationBillingUpdate(
      registrationId: $registrationId
      verificationStatus: $verificationStatus
      billingStatus: $billingStatus
      coPay: $coPay
      coInsurance: $coInsurance
      deductable: $deductable
      outOfPocket: $outOfPocket
      paymentStatus: $paymentStatus
      insuranceType: $insuranceType
    ) {
      ${Ip}
    }
  }
mutation ProviderTaskCreate:
mutation ProviderTaskCreate(
    $title: String!
    $assignedToIds: [ObjectId!]!
    $description: String
    $messageId: ObjectId
    $notification: Boolean
    $date: DateTime
    $priority: ProviderTaskPriority
    $conversationId: ObjectId
  ) {
    providerTaskCreate(
      title: $title
      assignedToIds: $assignedToIds
      description: $description
      messageId: $messageId
      notification: $notification
      date: $date
      priority: $priority
      conversationId: $conversationId
    ) {
      ...ProviderTaskItem
    }
  }
mutation ProviderTaskUpdate:
mutation ProviderTaskUpdate(
    $assignedToIds: [ObjectId!]!
    $taskId: ObjectId!
    $title: String
    $description: String
    $conversationId: ObjectId
    $messageId: ObjectId
    $notification: Boolean
    $date: DateTime
    $priority: ProviderTaskPriority
  ) {
    providerTaskUpdate(
      assignedToIds: $assignedToIds
      taskId: $taskId
      title: $title
      description: $description
      conversationId: $conversationId
      messageId: $messageId
      notification: $notification
      date: $date
      priority: $priority
    ) {
      ...ProviderTaskItem
    }
  }
query AppointmentsList:
query AppointmentsList(
    $q: String
    $skip: Int
    $take: Int
    $date: DateRangeInput!
    $excluded: Boolean

    $confirmationStatusIds: [ObjectId!]
    $emrServiceIds: [ObjectId]
    $locationIds: [ObjectId]
    $providerIds: [ObjectId]
    $paymentStatuses: [PatientPaymentStatus]
  ) {
    appointments(
      q: $q,
      skip: $skip,
      take: $take,
      date: $date,
      excluded: $excluded

      confirmationStatusIds: $confirmationStatusIds
      emrServiceIds: $emrServiceIds
      locationIds: $locationIds
      providerIds: $providerIds
      paymentStatuses: $paymentStatuses
    ) {
      totalItemCount

      items {
        ...AppointmentsListItem
      }
    }
  }
query PatientPayments:
query PatientPayments(
        $statementedAt: DateRangeInput
        $statuses: [PatientPaymentStatus!]
        $review: PaymentStatementReviewStatus
        $paidAt: DateRangeInput
        $postedAt: DateRangeInput
        $postingStatuses: [PatientPaymentPostingStatus!]
        $locationId: ObjectId
        $createdAt: DateRangeInput
        $q: String
        $skip: Int
        $take: Int
        $types: [PatientPaymentType!]
      ) {
        patientPayments(
          statementedAt: $statementedAt
          statuses: $statuses
          review: $review
          paidAt: $paidAt
          postedAt: $postedAt
          postingStatuses: $postingStatuses
          locationId: $locationId
          createdAt: $createdAt
          q: $q
          skip: $skip
          take: $take
          types: $types
        ) {
          totalItemCount

          items {
            ...PatientPaymentItem

            ... on PatientPaymentStatement {
              lastPaidAt
              review
            }
          }
        }
      }
query PatientRegistrations:
query PatientRegistrations($q: String,
  $skip: Int,
  $take: Int,
  $createdAt: DateRangeInput,
  $appointment: PatientRegistrationsAppointmentInput,
  $visitCompletedAt: DateRangeInput,
  $withAppointment: Boolean,
  $withConcentSigned: Boolean,
  $withIdentification: Boolean,
  $withMrra: Boolean,
  $withPayment: Boolean,
  $withScreening: Boolean) {
    patientRegistrations(q: $q,
    skip: $skip,
    take: $take,
    createdAt: $createdAt,
    appointment: $appointment,
    visitCompletedAt: $visitCompletedAt,
    withAppointment: $withAppointment,
    withConcentSigned: $withConcentSigned,
    withIdentification: $withIdentification,
    withMrra: $withMrra,
    withPayment: $withPayment,
    withScreening: $withScreening) {
      totalItemCount
      items {
        appointment {
          confirmationStatus {
            title
            status
          }
          date
          facility {
            label
            id
          }
          digitCode
          type {
            title
          }
          id
          status
        }
        checkedInAt
        createdAt
        id
        settings {
          name
          type
          id
          covid
          telemedicine
        }
        patient {
          id
          displayName
          dob
        }
        notes
      }
    }
  }
